name: shutdown-app
description: JARVIS-style shutdown server with futuristic UI and extensible command system

scripts.copy-ui: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(process.cwd(), 'src', 'ui'); const dest = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'ui'); if(fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive: true, force: true}); console.log('UI files copied to dist/ui'); }"

author: eva-akselrad
